title: Textron: From Underperformer To Winner?
text: Textron Inc. lays off 2% of its global workforce due to market conditions and mix pressure. The layoffs in the aerospace and defense segment align the company for a higher share of lower-margin development work. Textron's product line does not benefit significantly from increased demand for defense equipment in the war in Ukraine.

title: 3 Aerospace-Defense Stocks to Buy as Air Traffic Steadily Grows
text: The passing of defense bill by the U.S. administration and growing air traffic can be expected to overcome the woes of supply-chain disruption and appreciating U.S. dollar. You can buy SAFRY, TXT and LDOS.

title: 3 Aerospace Stocks to Launch Your Portfolio to New Heights in 2024
text: Aerospace stocks are rallying with the iShares U.S. Aerospace & Defense ETF (BATS: ITA ) up over 15% in the fourth quarter. Is this momentum likely to continue in 2024?

title: Textron to Release Fourth Quarter Results on January 24, 2024
text: PROVIDENCE, R.I.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Textron Inc. (NYSE: TXT) will release its fourth quarter 2023 financial results on Wednesday morning, January 24, 2024. Textron will also host a conference call at 8:00 a.m. (Eastern) to discuss the results and the company's outlook. The call will be available via webcast at www.textron.com or by direct dial at (844) 867-6169 in the U.S. or (409) 207-6975 outside of the U.S.; Access Code: 2046023. In addition, the call will be recorded and available for playba.

title: 3 Sleeper Stocks You'll Regret Not Buying Soon: December Edition
text: Figuring out what is going on in the bustling stock market can be quite challenging for investors. With big names stealing the spotlight, it can be hard for sleeper stocks to find their way to the portfolios of investors.

title: Civil Air Patrol and Textron Aviation Special Missions Celebrate Long-Standing Relationship
text: WICHITA, Kan.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Textron Aviation and Civil Air Patrol celebrate the delivery of four Cessna Skyhawk, one Cessna Skylane and one Cessna Turbo Stationair HD aircraft.

title: Reasons to Add Textron (TXT) to Your Portfolio Right Now
text: Textron (TXT) makes a strong case for investment in the aerospace sector, given its positive estimate revision, strong financial position and rising backlog.

title: Textron Aviation announces new SustainableAdvantage carbon offset program for Cessna, Beechcraft and Hawker owners
text: WICHITA, Kan.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Textron Aviation announced a new program to provide owners with an additional option for reducing their carbon dioxide emissions.

title: TXT or EADSY: Which Is the Better Value Stock Right Now?

title: SOUTHWEST AIRLINES ANNOUNCES NOMINATION OF LISA ATHERTON TO JOIN ITS BOARD OF DIRECTORS
text: DALLAS , Dec. 8, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- The Board of Directors of Southwest Airlines Co. (NYSE: LUV) has named Lisa Atherton as a candidate to join the Board. Atherton, along with other Board nominees, will be on the ballot at the Company's Annual Meeting of Shareholders on May 15, 2024.

title: Should Value Investors Buy Textron (TXT) Stock?
text: Here at Zacks, our focus is on the proven Zacks Rank system, which emphasizes earnings estimates and estimate revisions to find great stocks. Nevertheless, we are always paying attention to the latest value, growth, and momentum trends to underscore strong picks.
